allow: Bash(sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y cmake 2>&1)
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/yoya/index.js | head -5 || echo "服务器未运行，测试路径解析...")

Bash(node -e "import path from 'path'; import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'; const __filename = fileURLToPath\(import.meta.url\); const __dirname = path.dirname\(__filename\); const urlParts = '/yoya/index.js'; const filePath = path.join\(__dirname, 'src', urlParts\); console.log\('文件路径:', filePath\); console.log\('完整路径:', path.join\(process.cwd\(\), 'src', 'yoya', 'index.js'\)\);")
Bash(pkill -f "node server.js" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "vite" 2>/dev/null; npm run dev)
Bash(pkill -f "node server.js" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; npm run dev)
Bash(lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; npm start)
Bash(lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; echo "Port 3000 cleared")
Bash(npm search @playwright/mcp --json 2>/dev/null | head -50 || echo "搜索失败")

Bash(git add -A && git commit -m "保存 VField 当前版本

- 保留当前事件处理实现
- 准备重构事件系统")
